examTitle: Shopping & Fashion CEFR C1 Mock Reading & Use of English

parts.title: Part 1: Multiple-Choice Cloze on Fashion Trends
parts.instructions: Read the text below and decide which answer (A, B, C or D) best fits each gap.
parts.content: The rise of fast fashion has led to a (1) _______ in the way people shop for clothing. Gone are the days when people would buy high-quality, timeless pieces. Now, people are more interested in (2) _______ trendy clothes at affordable prices. This has resulted in a (3) _______ of waste, with many people throwing away clothes after just a few wearings. The environmental impact of this trend is (4) _______ and is a major concern for many people. In fact, some people are starting to (5) _______ about the sustainability of fast fashion. They are looking for alternative ways to shop, such as buying second-hand clothes or (6) _______ from sustainable fashion brands. By doing so, they hope to reduce their (7) _______ on the environment and promote a more (8) _______ fashion industry.

questions.question: Gap 1
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'increase' because the passage states that the rise of fast fashion has led to a change in the way people shop for clothing, implying an increase in the adoption of this trend.
questions.tips: Pay close attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the verb 'led' in the first sentence.

questions.question: Gap 2
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'buy' because the passage states that people are more interested in buying trendy clothes at affordable prices.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a change in behavior, such as 'more interested in'.

questions.question: Gap 3
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'reduction' because the passage states that the result of fast fashion is a waste of clothes, implying a reduction in the quality of clothes.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'result'.

questions.question: Gap 4
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'major' because the passage states that the environmental impact of fast fashion is a concern for many people.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'major concern'.

questions.question: Gap 5
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'start' because the passage states that some people are starting to think about the sustainability of fast fashion.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the verb 'starting'.

questions.question: Gap 6
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'buy' because the passage states that people are looking for alternative ways to shop, such as buying clothes from sustainable fashion brands.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a change in behavior, such as 'looking for alternative ways'.

questions.question: Gap 7
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'impact' because the passage states that people are looking to reduce their impact on the environment.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'impact'.

questions.question: Gap 8
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'sustainable' because the passage states that people are looking to promote a more sustainable fashion industry.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'promote a more sustainable fashion industry'.

parts.title: Part 2: Open Cloze on Sustainable Fashion
parts.instructions: Read the text below and think of the word which best fits each gap. Use only one word in each gap.
parts.content: The fashion industry has a (1) _______ to reduce its environmental impact. One way to do this is to use (2) _______ materials in clothing production. Another way is to (3) _______ the life cycle of clothes, from production to disposal. This can be achieved through (4) _______ design, where clothes are made to be (5) _______ and worn multiple times.

questions.question: Gap 1
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'responsibility' because the passage states that the fashion industry has a responsibility to reduce its environmental impact.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'has a responsibility'.

questions.question: Gap 2
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'eco-friendly' because the passage states that one way to reduce the environmental impact of the fashion industry is to use eco-friendly materials in clothing production.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'eco-friendly'.

questions.question: Gap 3
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'shorten' because the passage states that one way to reduce the environmental impact of the fashion industry is to shorten the life cycle of clothes.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a change in behavior, such as 'shorten the life cycle'.

questions.question: Gap 4
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'sustainable' because the passage states that one way to reduce the environmental impact of the fashion industry is through sustainable design.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'sustainable'.

questions.question: Gap 5
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'longer' because the passage states that clothes made through sustainable design are made to be longer and worn multiple times.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'made to be longer'.

parts.title: Part 3: Word Formation on Sustainable Fashion
parts.instructions: Read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.
parts.content: The fashion industry has a responsibility to reduce its environmental (1) _______ (IMPACT). One way to do this is to use eco-friendly materials in clothing (2) _______ (PRODUCTION). Another way is to shorten the life cycle of clothes, from (3) _______ (PRODUCTION) to disposal. This can be achieved through sustainable design, where clothes are made to be longer and worn (4) _______ (TIME). The use of sustainable materials in clothing production can also help to reduce waste and (5) _______ (CONSUMPTION) of resources.

questions.question: SIGNIFY
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'significance' because the passage states that the fashion industry has a responsibility to reduce its environmental impact, which signifies the importance of this issue.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'has a responsibility'.

questions.question: SIGNIFY
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'signification' because the passage states that the use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and signify the importance of sustainable production.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'signify'.

questions.question: SIGNIFY
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'signifying' because the passage states that the use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and signify the importance of sustainable production.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a change in behavior, such as 'help to reduce waste'.

questions.question: SIGNIFY
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'significance' because the passage states that the use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and signify the importance of sustainable production.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'signify'.

questions.question: SIGNIFY
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'signifying' because the passage states that the use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and signify the importance of sustainable production.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'help to reduce waste'.

parts.title: Part 4: Key Word Transformations on Sustainable Fashion
parts.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given.

questions.question: The fashion industry has a responsibility to reduce its environmental impact.
questions.correctOption: to reduce its impact on the environment
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'to reduce its impact on the environment' because it conveys the same meaning as the first sentence, which states that the fashion industry has a responsibility to reduce its environmental impact.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'has a responsibility'.

questions.question: The use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste.
questions.correctOption: and reduce the amount of waste produced
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'and reduce the amount of waste produced' because it conveys the same meaning as the first sentence, which states that the use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'can help'.

questions.question: The fashion industry is trying to reduce its environmental impact.
questions.correctOption: by reducing its effect on the environment
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'by reducing its effect on the environment' because it conveys the same meaning as the first sentence, which states that the fashion industry is trying to reduce its environmental impact.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a change in behavior, such as 'trying to reduce'.

questions.question: The use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to promote sustainable fashion.
questions.correctOption: and promote the use of eco-friendly materials
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'and promote the use of eco-friendly materials' because it conveys the same meaning as the first sentence, which states that the use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to promote sustainable fashion.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'can help'.

questions.question: The fashion industry needs to reduce its environmental impact.
questions.correctOption: and reduce its effect on the environment
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'and reduce its effect on the environment' because it conveys the same meaning as the first sentence, which states that the fashion industry needs to reduce its environmental impact.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'needs to reduce'.

questions.question: The use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and promote sustainable fashion.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is 'and promote eco-friendly clothing production' because it conveys the same meaning as the first sentence, which states that the use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and promote sustainable fashion.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'can help'.

parts.title: Part 5: Multiple-Choice Reading Comprehension on Sustainable Fashion
parts.instructions: Read the text and answer the questions. For each question, choose the correct answer A, B, C or D.
parts.content: The fashion industry has a significant impact on the environment. One of the main reasons for this is the production of clothing, which requires large amounts of water and energy. Additionally, the use of synthetic materials in clothing production contributes to pollution and waste. To reduce its environmental impact, the fashion industry is trying to adopt more sustainable practices, such as using eco-friendly materials and reducing waste. However, this requires significant investments in research and development, as well as changes in consumer behavior. Nevertheless, the benefits of sustainable fashion far outweigh the costs, and it is essential that the fashion industry takes action to reduce its environmental impact.

questions.question: What is the main reason for the fashion industry's significant impact on the environment?
options: A. The production of clothing requires large amounts of water and energy.
B. The use of synthetic materials in clothing production contributes to pollution and waste.
C. The fashion industry's reliance on fast fashion.
D. The increasing demand for luxury clothing.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is A because the passage states that one of the main reasons for the fashion industry's significant impact on the environment is the production of clothing, which requires large amounts of water and energy.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'main reason'.

questions.question: What is the fashion industry trying to adopt to reduce its environmental impact?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is B because the passage states that the fashion industry is trying to adopt more sustainable practices to reduce its environmental impact.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'trying to adopt'.

questions.question: What is one of the benefits of sustainable fashion?
options: A. Increased profits for the fashion industry.
D. Increased demand for luxury clothing.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is B because the passage states that one of the benefits of sustainable fashion is reduced waste and pollution.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'benefits'.

questions.question: What is essential for the fashion industry to reduce its environmental impact?
options: A. Significant investments in research and development.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is C because the passage states that both significant investments in research and development and changes in consumer behavior are essential for the fashion industry to reduce its environmental impact.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'essential'.

questions.question: What is the outcome of the fashion industry's efforts to reduce its environmental impact?
options: C. No change in waste and pollution.
D. Increased profits for the fashion industry.
questions.explanation: The correct answer is B because the passage states that the benefits of sustainable fashion far outweigh the costs, implying that the fashion industry's efforts to reduce its environmental impact will result in reduced waste and pollution.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'benefits far outweigh the costs'.

questions.question: What is the fashion industry's current attitude towards sustainable fashion?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is B because the passage states that the fashion industry is trying to adopt more sustainable practices to reduce its environmental impact, indicating a positive attitude towards sustainable fashion.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'trying to adopt'.

parts.title: Part 6: Cross-Text Multiple Matching on Sustainable Fashion
parts.instructions: Read the four texts about the topic. For Questions 1-6, choose from the writers A-D.
parts.content:
Writer A:
The fashion industry has a significant impact on the environment. One of the main reasons for this is the production of clothing, which requires large amounts of water and energy.

Writer B:
The use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and pollution. However, this requires significant investments in research and development, as well as changes in consumer behavior.

Writer C:
The fashion industry is trying to adopt more sustainable practices to reduce its environmental impact. This includes using eco-friendly materials and reducing waste.

Writer D:
The benefits of sustainable fashion far outweigh the costs. It is essential that the fashion industry takes action to reduce its environmental impact.

questions.question: What is essential for the fashion industry to reduce its environmental impact?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is C because the passage by Writer C states that the fashion industry is trying to adopt more sustainable practices to reduce its environmental impact, which includes using eco-friendly materials and reducing waste.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'essential'.

questions.question: What is one of the challenges facing the fashion industry?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is B because the passage by Writer B states that the use of sustainable materials in clothing production requires significant investments in research and development, as well as changes in consumer behavior.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a challenge, such as 'requires significant investments'.

questions.question: What is the outcome of the fashion industry's efforts to reduce its environmental impact?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is D because the passage by Writer D states that the benefits of sustainable fashion far outweigh the costs, implying that the fashion industry's efforts to reduce its environmental impact will result in reduced waste and pollution.
questions.tips: Look for words and phrases that indicate a level of importance, such as 'benefits far outweigh the costs'.

questions.question: What is the fashion industry's current attitude towards sustainable fashion?
questions.explanation: The correct answer is C because the passage by Writer C states that the fashion industry is trying to adopt more sustainable practices to reduce its environmental impact, indicating a positive attitude towards sustainable fashion.
questions.tips: Pay attention to the context and make sure to understand the meaning of the word 'trying to adopt'.

parts.title: Part 7: Gapped Text on Sustainable Fashion
parts.instructions: Six paragraphs have been removed from the text. Choose from the paragraphs A-G the one which fits each gap. There is one extra paragraph which you do not need to use.
parts.content:
The fashion industry has a significant impact on the environment. One of the main reasons for this is the production of clothing,
[Gap 1]
which requires large amounts of water and energy.

The use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and pollution.
However, this requires significant investments in research and development,
as well as changes in consumer behavior.

The fashion industry is trying to adopt more sustainable practices to reduce its environmental impact.
This includes using eco-friendly materials
[Gap 2]
and reducing waste.

The benefits of sustainable fashion far outweigh the costs.
It is essential that the fashion industry takes action to reduce its environmental impact.

The production of clothing is a complex process that involves several stages,
including design, production, and distribution.

The use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and pollution,
but it also requires significant investments in research and development,
as well as changes in consumer behavior.

The fashion industry is trying to adopt more sustainable practices to reduce its environmental impact,
as well as reduce waste and pollution.

The benefits of sustainable fashion far outweigh the costs,
and it is essential that the fashion industry takes action to reduce its environmental impact.

[Gap 3]
The production of clothing is a complex process that involves several stages,
including design, production, and distribution.

[Gap 4]
The use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and pollution,
but it also requires significant investments in research and development,
as well as changes in consumer behavior.

[Gap 5]The fashion industry is trying to adopt more sustainable practices to reduce its environmental impact,
as well as reduce waste and pollution.

[Gap 6]
The benefits of sustainable fashion far outweigh the costs,
and it is essential that the fashion industry takes action to reduce its environmental impact.

parts.title: Part 8: Multiple Matching on Sustainable Fashion
parts.instructions: Read the text. For Questions 1-8, choose from the sections A-D.
parts.content:
Section A:
The fashion industry has a significant impact on the environment. One of the main reasons for this is the production of clothing, which requires large amounts of water and energy.

Section B:
The use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and pollution. However, this requires significant investments in research and development, as well as changes in consumer behavior.

Section C:
The fashion industry is trying to adopt more sustainable practices to reduce its environmental impact. This includes using eco-friendly materials and reducing waste.

Section D:
The benefits of sustainable fashion far outweigh the costs. It is essential that the fashion industry takes action to reduce its environmental impact.

Section E:
The production of clothing is a complex process that involves several stages, including design, production, and distribution.

Section F:
The use of sustainable materials in clothing production can help to reduce waste and pollution, but it also requires significant investments in research and development, as well as changes in consumer behavior.

Section G:
The fashion industry is trying to adopt more sustainable practices to reduce its environmental impact, as well as reduce waste and pollution.

Section H:
The benefits of sustainable fashion far outweigh the costs, and it is essential that the fashion industry takes action to reduce its environmental impact.
